overview.title: Sales Workflows
overview.who: Sales Team (Raghuvir, Aniket, NJG, BNG in Bangalore)
overview.what: Convert customer interactions into revenue via Daily Call Reports, Leads, Opportunities, Quotations, and Sales Orders
overview.when: Daily — DCRs from field staff, leads converted to opportunities weekly, quotations tracked for follow-up

workflows.name: Daily Call Report → Lead (Auto-linked System)
prerequisites: Field staff must be assigned as Employee with active user account
Customer must exist in ERPNext database
DCR checkout must include 'Lead Generated' checkbox

steps.title: Field Staff Creates DCR
steps.description: Field staff checks in at customer location with GPS coordinates
steps.expected: DCR created in 'In Progress' state with GPS coordinates recorded

steps.title: Field Staff Fills Discussion & Outcome
steps.description: Staff documents visit details and marks 'Lead Generated' checkbox
details: Fill 'Discussion Remarks' (what was discussed with customer)
Select 'Next Action' from dropdown (Follow-up / Quotation needed / Order expected)
Check the 'Lead Generated' checkbox if customer expressed interest
steps.expected: Discussion and outcome fields populated; 'Lead Generated' checkbox checked

steps.title: Field Staff Checks Out
steps.description: Staff exits visit and confirms completion
details: Click 'Check Out' button at bottom of DCR form
System captures checkout time and GPS location
Confirm completion in bottom sheet modal
steps.expected: DCR submitted with checkout timestamp

steps.title: System Auto-Creates Lead
steps.description: Vaishali backend automatically creates Lead and links to DCR
details: System checks DCR for 'Lead Generated' = 1 on submission
• notes child table entry with DCR link
• lead_owner assigned to sales manager or field staff
Lead is automatically assigned to Sales team
steps.expected: Lead document created in 'Open' state with all customer details pre-filled; Lead appears in Sales team's queue

workflows.what_happens_next: Sales team follows up on generated leads, converting them to Opportunities within 7-14 days. Lead age indicator on ERPNext dashboard shows follow-up urgency.

workflows.name: Lead → Opportunity (Manual Conversion)
prerequisites: Lead must exist and be assigned to sales team
Lead details (name, email, mobile) should be complete
Customer details (potential business type, budget, timeline) discussed

steps.title: Open Lead from List
steps.description: Sales team views generated leads and selects one for follow-up
details: Filter by 'Status: Open' to see active leads
Filter by 'Lead Source: Daily Call Report' to see field-generated leads
Sort by 'Created On' (newest first) or 'Lead Age' (oldest first for follow-up)
Click on a lead to open detail view
steps.expected: Lead document opens showing customer name, contact info, DCR source link, and age indicator

steps.title: Review Lead Details & Age
steps.description: Verify lead information and check follow-up urgency
details: Review notes child table for DCR discussion remarks
Note 'Lead Age' indicator (shows days since creation, color-coded: green <7d, orange 7-14d, red >14d)
Check if customer has existing relationship (click 'Customer' link if available)
steps.expected: Lead details visible; age indicator shows follow-up urgency; DCR notes provide context

steps.title: Click 'Convert to Opportunity' Button
steps.description: Initiate lead conversion to Opportunity record
details: Click 'Convert to Opportunity' button (red button in toolbar)
steps.expected: Conversion dialog appears with opportunity template options

steps.title: Fill Opportunity Details
steps.expected: Opportunity form pre-filled with lead data, waiting for sales insights

steps.title: Assign Opportunity & Submit
steps.description: Assign sales owner and create opportunity record
details: System creates Opportunity document linked to original Lead
steps.expected: Opportunity document created and linked to Lead; visible in Sales CRM pipeline

workflows.what_happens_next: Sales team tracks opportunity through pipeline stages (Pending, Qualification, Proposal, Negotiation, Won/Lost). Quotations created from opportunities to move deals forward.

workflows.name: Opportunity → Quotation (Manual Creation)
prerequisites: Opportunity must exist and be assigned
Customer details confirmed (GSTIN, shipping address, contact person)
Product/service scope defined (which items to quote)
Pricing strategy determined (standard pricing or discount authorized)

steps.title: Open Opportunity in Pipeline View
steps.description: Sales team accesses opportunity to create quotation
details: Find opportunity in list or pipeline kanban view
Click on opportunity to open detail form
Review opportunity_amount (estimated deal value) and expected_close_date
steps.expected: Opportunity detail view open; action buttons visible

steps.title: Click 'Create Quotation' Button
details: Scroll down to action buttons (or use top toolbar)
System opens new quotation form pre-filled with opportunity data
steps.expected: Quotation form appears with party_name, opportunity link, and empty items table

steps.title: Add Items to Quotation
details: Select 'item_code' (search by name: e.g., 'BLA07006 Control Unit', 'SOFTWARE', 'DMH02001 Load Monitor')
qty auto-fills to 1; update as needed
rate auto-populates from item master (or latest BOM cost)
Repeat to add multiple line items
Can adjust rate if custom pricing authorized
steps.expected: Items added to quotation table; amount auto-calculated for each row

steps.title: Set Quotation Terms & Pricing
steps.description: Configure quotation validity and payment terms
details: Set valid_till (default: 30 days from today, auto-populated by vaishali)
Add notes if special terms or conditions apply
steps.expected: Valid_till shows red if expiration approaching; quotation ready for submission

steps.title: Save & Submit Quotation
steps.description: Finalize quotation and send to customer
details: Select 'Email Print' to send quotation PDF to customer email
steps.expected: Quotation submitted; Opportunity conversion_status updated to 'Quoted'; customer receives quotation via email

workflows.what_happens_next: Customer reviews quotation and responds with acceptance/rejection. Sales team tracks quotation via age indicator (red if >14 days old, due for follow-up). Accepted quotations converted to Sales Orders; rejected quotations marked as 'Lost' with reason category (Price/Technical/Budget/Other).

workflows.name: Quotation → Sales Order (Customer Acceptance)
prerequisites: Quotation must be submitted
Customer has accepted quotation
Delivery address and terms confirmed
Billing GSTIN/PAN verified in Customer master

steps.title: Open Accepted Quotation
steps.description: Locate customer-approved quotation ready for order conversion
details: Search for quotation by customer name or quotation_id
Verify all items and pricing are customer-approved
steps.expected: Submitted quotation open; 'Create Sales Order' button visible

steps.title: Click 'Create Sales Order' Button
details: Scroll to action buttons or use top toolbar
System opens new sales order form with quotation data pre-filled
All items, quantities, rates copied from quotation
steps.expected: Sales Order form appears pre-filled; warehouse and delivery settings awaiting configuration

steps.title: Configure Order Details
steps.description: Set warehouse, delivery address, and order series
details: set_warehouse (select: 'Finished Goods - DSPL' for DSPL company)
shipping_address (confirm or select from customer addresses)
billing_address (confirm or select from customer addresses)
steps.expected: Delivery, warehouse, and address fields configured; ready for submission

steps.title: Review Order Total & Tax
steps.description: Verify final order amount including taxes
details: Review items_total (sum of line items before tax)
Review tax_amount (GST or other applicable taxes)
Confirm payment terms and due date
steps.expected: Total amount correct; taxes calculated per company configuration

steps.title: Save & Submit Sales Order
steps.description: Finalize order and trigger downstream workflows
details: Click 'Save' to save order as draft
Review all fields one final time
Click 'Submit' button to lock and finalize order
System auto-creates Work Order if manufacturing required
steps.expected: Sales Order submitted; status = 'To Deliver'; linked to Quotation and Opportunity; inventory reserved

workflows.what_happens_next: Sales Order triggers manufacturing (Work Order creation), delivery planning (Delivery Note), and invoice creation (Sales Invoice). Finance team processes payment collection per payment terms. Customer receives delivery notification and invoice.

overview.title: Field Staff Workflows
overview.who: Field Staff (Raghuvir, Aniket, NJG, BNG — Bangalore-based; also contract field representatives)
overview.what: Daily customer visits with GPS tracking, discussion documentation, and automated sales lead generation; mobile-first PWA on smartphones
overview.when: Daily during working hours; field staff typically start 9 AM, visit 4-6 customers per day, return by 5 PM

workflows.name: Daily Call Report (DCR) with GPS Tracking
prerequisites: Field staff must have Employee record with active user account
Smartphone with Vaishali PWA installed (available at https://dgoc.logstop.com/field)
GPS enabled on phone (location permission granted to browser)
Customer database pre-populated in ERPNext (field staff cannot create new customers on mobile)

steps.title: Open Vaishali Field App
steps.description: Launch mobile PWA from smartphone home screen or browser
details: If installed as PWA: tap Vaishali icon on phone home screen (standalone app)
If using browser: navigate to https://dgoc.logstop.com/field
Automatically logged in via browser cookie if already authenticated to ERPNext
Home screen shows greeting with current time/date, KPI row (Team Present, Approvals Pending), and action cards
steps.expected: Vaishali app opens in full-screen PWA mode; Home screen displays with personalized greeting

steps.title: Navigate to Visits Tab
steps.description: Access Daily Call Report entry screen
details: In bottom navigation, tap 'Home' tab (if not already active)
Scroll down to action cards section
Tap 'New Visit' action card (icon: checkmark + location pin)
App navigates to Visits screen with list of today's DCRs (if any)
Tap 'New Visit' button (FAB or + button) to create DCR
steps.expected: Visits screen open; list shows previous DCRs; New Visit form ready to open

steps.title: App Requests Location Permission
steps.description: Confirm GPS access for location capture
details: Browser prompts: 'Vaishali wants to access your location' (first time only)
If previously denied, go to Settings → Browser → Vaishali → Location → 'Allow'
GPS coordinates will be captured at check-in and check-out
steps.expected: Location permission granted; GPS coordinates accessible to app

steps.title: Select Customer from List
details: Type customer name to filter (e.g., 'Krisp', 'DCEPL', 'ABC Industries')
Customer email and phone auto-populate if available
steps.expected: Customer selected; customer name, email, phone visible in form

steps.title: Fill Customer Reference & Contact Person
details: customer_reference (optional: reference number from customer, e.g., 'PO-123', 'Project ABC')
contact_person (name of person met, e.g., 'Arun Kumar', 'Plant Manager')
Tap 'Check In' button when ready to start visit
steps.expected: Customer details and contact person recorded; check-in initiated

steps.title: App Captures Check-In GPS & Time
steps.description: System records arrival location and timestamp
details: App captures current GPS coordinates (latitude, longitude)
Toast notification: 'Location captured' displays at top of screen
Field staff now free to conduct visit (app continues running in background)
steps.expected: Check-in time and GPS recorded; toast confirms 'Location captured'; DCR in 'In Progress' state

steps.title: Conduct Customer Visit
steps.description: Field staff meets customer, discusses products/services
details: Field staff discusses DSPL products (crane controls, load monitors, safety systems)
Documents discussion topics for later entry
Takes photos of equipment/site if needed (optional, not in app yet)
Notes customer interest level, pain points, next steps verbally
steps.expected: Visit happens outside app; notes mentally recorded or on notepad

steps.title: Return to App & Scroll to Discussion Section
details: Navigate back to Visits tab (if navigated away)
Open the DCR form again (taps 'In Progress' DCR from list)
Scroll down past customer details to 'Discussion' section
steps.expected: DCR form open in 'In Progress' state; Discussion section visible

steps.title: Fill Discussion Remarks
details: discussion_remarks (text area: detailed summary of discussion)
Example: 'Discussed ACD 3300 Pro load monitor for 25-ton overhead crane. Customer interested in safety certification. Referred to sales team for technical demo.'
Keep remarks concise (1-2 sentences) but informative for sales team
steps.expected: Discussion remarks entered in text field

steps.title: Select Next Action & Date
details: next_action_date (date picker: when follow-up should happen)
Example: Select 'Follow-up', set date to 7 days from today
steps.expected: Next action and date selected; shows in form

steps.title: Check 'Lead Generated' if Interested Customer
details: If customer expressed interest: check 'Lead Generated' checkbox
If no interest or just maintenance call: leave unchecked
steps.expected: 'Lead Generated' checkbox checked if customer interested; left unchecked for routine calls

steps.title: Scroll to Bottom & Tap 'Check Out'
details: Scroll to bottom of DCR form
Bottom sheet modal appears asking to confirm checkout
steps.expected: Checkout confirmation modal appears

steps.title: Confirm Checkout in Modal
details: Modal shows: 'Confirm checkout? This will finalize the visit record.'
System captures checkout GPS and timestamp
steps.expected: Checkout time and GPS recorded; DCR submitted to server; success toast shown; DCR status = 'Submitted'

steps.title: Next Visit or End of Day
steps.description: Continue to next customer or close app
details: If more customers to visit: repeat from step 4 (Select Customer)
If end of day: close Vaishali app
App syncs all DCRs to server automatically
Data stored locally in PWA cache for offline access if needed
steps.expected: Field staff ready for next visit or day concludes; all DCRs synced to server

workflows.what_happens_next: Backend system auto-creates Lead if 'Lead Generated' checked. Sales team receives lead notification and begins follow-up. Visit data tracked in Sales Dashboard for performance metrics (visits per day, conversion rate, etc.). Manager can view field staff location history for territory management.

workflows.name: Auto-Linking to Leads (System Automation)
prerequisites: Daily Call Report must be submitted with 'Lead Generated' checkbox = 1
Customer details (name, email, phone) must exist in DCR
Sales team role must be configured in Vaishali

steps.title: Field Staff Submits DCR
steps.description: Field staff checks out with 'Lead Generated' flagged
details: See step 11 in 'Daily Call Report with GPS' workflow
steps.expected: DCR submitted with 'Lead Generated' = 1

steps.title: Backend Detects Lead Generation Flag
steps.description: Vaishali backend hook processes submitted DCR
details: System checks: if dcr.lead_generated == 1 and dcr.customer exists
steps.expected: Backend hook processes DCR; conditions met for lead creation

steps.title: System Auto-Creates Lead Document
steps.description: Vaishali backend auto-generates Lead with customer details
details: • lead_name = Customer name (e.g., 'ABC Industries Pvt Ltd')
• lead_owner = Field staff employee or Sales Manager (auto-assigned)
• Notes child table entry created with: 'DCR ID: ' + dcr.name + '\n' + dcr.discussion_remarks
steps.expected: Lead document created in ERPNext with all customer data pre-filled; notes include DCR context

steps.title: System Updates DCR Conversion Status
steps.description: Backend marks DCR as having generated a lead
details: DCR custom field 'conversion_status' updated to 'Lead Created'
DCR 'lead' link field populated with Lead name
Field staff can see in app that lead was auto-created
steps.expected: DCR conversion_status = 'Lead Created'; lead field populated

steps.title: Sales Team Receives Notification
steps.description: Sales team alerted to new lead for follow-up
details: Notification sent to Sales Manager/assigned sales user
Notification shows: 'New Lead: [Customer Name] generated from DCR by [Field Staff Name]'
Link to Lead document for immediate follow-up
Telegram notification sent if team configured (optional)
steps.expected: Sales team receives notification; can immediately open Lead for follow-up

steps.title: Sales Team Converts Lead to Opportunity
details: Sales team follows 'Lead → Opportunity' workflow documented in Sales tab
Opens Lead from notification or queue
steps.expected: Opportunity created; linked back to original DCR and Lead

workflows.what_happens_next: Opportunity progresses through sales pipeline (qualification → proposal → negotiation). If customer buys, Quotation → Sales Order created. Opportunity completion closes the loop from field visit to revenue. Field staff sees in their monthly report how many of their generated leads converted to sales (key performance metric).

overview.title: HR Workflows
overview.who: HR Team (leave approvers, expense managers, finance team); Field Staff (employees submitting requests)
overview.what: Attendance tracking, leave requests/approvals, expense reports, salary advances, and payroll management
overview.when: Attendance daily; leave/expense submitted as needed; payroll monthly; approvals within 2-3 business days

workflows.name: Attendance Check-in/Check-out
prerequisites: Employee record with active user account
Vaishali PWA installed on smartphone
GPS enabled for location capture (optional but recommended)

steps.title: Open Vaishali Field App in Morning
steps.description: Launch app at start of workday
details: Tap Vaishali icon on phone home screen (PWA)
App opens to Home screen showing greeting with current time/date
Greeting changes based on time: 'Good Morning [Name]' (before 12 PM), 'Good Afternoon [Name]' (12-5 PM), 'Good Evening [Name]' (after 5 PM)
steps.expected: App opens; personalized greeting displayed

steps.title: Tap 'Check In' Action Card
details: In action cards section (below KPI row), find 'Check In / Check Out' card
Tap the card or button to check in
App requests location permission (first time only) — tap 'Allow'
System records current time as check-in timestamp
steps.expected: Check-in recorded; toast shows 'Checked in at [TIME]'; app displays check-out button now visible

steps.title: Work Throughout the Day
details: Can use Vaishali app for other tasks (visits, quotations, etc.)
Can close app — attendance session remains open server-side
Can switch away from Vaishali to other apps
steps.expected: Attendance session open; employee working

steps.title: Tap 'Check Out' Action Card at Day End
details: At end of workday (5-6 PM typically), open Vaishali app
In action cards, find 'Check In / Check Out' card showing 'Check Out' button
System records current time as check-out timestamp
steps.expected: Check-out recorded; toast shows 'Checked out at [TIME]'; working hours calculated

steps.title: Attendance Record Complete
details: Employee Checkin document created in ERPNext with:
Manager can view team attendance dashboard
steps.expected: Daily attendance recorded; visible in manager's Attendance view; payroll system updated

workflows.what_happens_next: Attendance data feeds HR Dashboard, Attendance Reports, and Payroll. Monthly payroll runs on attendance record; days missed = deduction. Leave requests deduct from attendance. Overtime tracked for bonus calculations.

workflows.name: Leave Request & Approval (Stub for Future)
prerequisites: Employee must have leave balance in employee master
Leave approver assigned to employee (via 'reports_to' hierarchy)

steps.title: Submit Leave Request
details: Fill: from_date, to_date, leave_type (Annual / Sick / Casual), reason
steps.expected: Leave request submitted; awaiting approval

steps.title: Leave Approver Reviews & Approves
steps.description: Manager approves or rejects leave request
steps.expected: Leave request approved; employee notified

workflows.what_happens_next: Approved leave deducted from employee balance. Attendance marked as 'Leave' for those dates. Payroll excludes leave days from salary (unpaid leave) or includes leave encashment (paid leave type-dependent).

workflows.name: Expense Report & Approval (Stub for Future)
prerequisites: Employee has expense policy configured
Expense approver assigned

steps.title: Submit Expense Report
details: Add expense details: date, category (Travel/Meals/Other), amount, description
steps.expected: Expense report submitted for approval

steps.title: Approver Reviews Expenses
details: Verifies policy compliance and receipt validity
steps.expected: Expense approved; reimbursement scheduled

workflows.what_happens_next: Approved expense reimbursement added to next payroll or paid via separate check. Finance department tracks expense by category for budget reporting.

workflows.name: Salary Advance Request & Approval (Stub for Future)
prerequisites: Employee has completed probation period (policy-dependent)
Advance policy configured in HR settings

steps.title: Request Salary Advance
steps.expected: Advance request submitted for approval

steps.title: HR Manager Approves Advance
steps.description: HR manager evaluates and approves request
details: Checks employee's previous advances, salary history
System auto-calculates monthly deduction from salary
steps.expected: Advance approved; payment scheduled

workflows.what_happens_next: Approved advance transferred to employee bank account within 2-3 days. Monthly deduction from salary spread across repayment period. Finance tracks advance recovery.

overview.title: Operations & Manufacturing Workflows
overview.who: Operations Team (warehouse staff, manufacturing team, logistics coordinators)
overview.what: Stock management, manufacturing work orders, delivery planning, and inventory optimization
overview.when: Daily stock checks, manufacturing as per sales orders, deliveries coordinated with warehouse

workflows.name: Stock Management & Inventory Adjustment
prerequisites: Warehouse configured (e.g., 'Finished Goods - DSPL')
Items created in item master with stock uoms (units/pieces)
Stock manager role configured

steps.title: View Current Stock Levels
details: Or view Stock Balance Report for real-time stock by warehouse
See current quantity on hand (QOH) for all items
steps.expected: Stock list shows item codes, quantities, reorder levels, and warehouse locations

steps.title: Identify Stock Adjustment Needs
details: Items below reorder level flagged (e.g., 'BLA07006 Control Unit' minimum: 50, current: 30)
Inventory reconciliation (physical count vs system) requires adjustment
Items transferred between warehouses need stock movement record
steps.expected: Operations team identifies stock needs

steps.title: Create Stock Entry
details: • 'Material Issue' = removing stock from warehouse (damage, loss)
• 'Material Receipt' = receiving new stock from purchase order or manufacturing
steps.expected: Stock Entry form open with type selected

steps.title: Add Items & Quantities
steps.expected: Items added to stock entry with quantities

steps.title: Save & Submit Stock Entry
details: Review total quantity and warehouse location
Click 'Submit' button to lock and post entry
System updates warehouse stock levels automatically
steps.expected: Stock Entry submitted; warehouse inventory updated; audit trail recorded

workflows.what_happens_next: Stock levels updated in real-time. Sales Order fulfillment checks available stock. If stock insufficient for order, manufacturing work order created to build more units. Low stock alerts trigger purchase orders to suppliers. Valuation reports updated for financial accounting.

workflows.name: Manufacturing Work Order (Stub for Future)
prerequisites: Sales Order submitted
BOM (Bill of Materials) exists for product
Components available in stock or on purchase order

steps.title: Create Work Order from Sales Order
details: Or manually create with: sales_order reference, product_code, qty_to_produce
steps.expected: Work Order created with material requirements

steps.title: Assign Components & Schedule
steps.expected: Work Order submitted; materials reserved; production scheduled

workflows.what_happens_next: Manufacturing team follows BOM, produces product, and records completion. Finished goods moved to warehouse stock. Sales Order delivery date updated. Customer notified of readiness.

workflows.name: Delivery Planning & Shipment (Stub for Future)
prerequisites: Sales Order submitted
Stock available in 'Finished Goods - DSPL' warehouse
Customer shipping address confirmed

steps.title: Create Delivery Note
steps.expected: Delivery Note form ready for shipping details

steps.title: Print & Ship
details: Print packing slip for warehouse team
Tracking number recorded in Delivery Note
steps.expected: Shipment dispatched; customer receives package

workflows.what_happens_next: Delivery Note submitted; Sales Order status = 'To Bill'. Finance creates Sales Invoice for billing. Customer receives shipment and invoice. Payment collection begins per payment terms.
